title: Edwards Lifesciences (EW) Q2 Earnings Meet Estimates, Margins Up
text: Edwards Lifesciences (EW) posts Q2 earnings in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate, with robust performances across all product groups driving the top line.

title: Edwards Lifesciences Corporation (EW) CEO Mike Mussallem on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Edwards Lifesciences Corporation (NYSE:EW ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Mark Wilterding - VP, IR and Treasurer Mike Mussallem - Chairman and CEO Scott Ullem - CFO Larry Wood - Global Leader, TAVR Bernard Zovighian - Global Leader, TMTT Conference Call Participants Robbie Marcus - JPMorgan Larry Biegelsen - Wells Fargo Vijay Kumar - Evercore ISI Joanne Wuensch - Citi Cecilia Furlong - Morgan Stanley Travis Steed - Bank of America Suraj Kalia - Oppenheimer Ed Ridley - Redburn Bill Plovanic - Canaccord Adam Maeder - Piper Sandler Josh Jennings - Cowen Operator Greetings, and welcome to the Edwards Lifesciences' Second Quarter 2022 Results Conference Call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Edwards Lifesciences (EW) Matches Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Edwards Lifesciences (EW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 1.61%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Edwards Lifesciences (EW) to Post Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Edwards Lifesciences' (EW) Q2 performance will likely reflect the continued adoption of the RESILIA tissue valves and enhanced sales of the HemoSphere platform.

title: EDWARDS LIFESCIENCES TO HOST EARNINGS CONFERENCE CALL ON JULY 28, 2022
text: IRVINE, Calif. , July 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE: EW) plans to announce its operating results for the quarter ended June 30, 2022 after the market closes on Thursday, July 28, 2022, and will host a conference call at 5:00 p.m.

title: 4 Profitable Companies With Solid Financial Conditions
text: When screening the market for value opportunities, investors may want to consider stocks that represent companies with high profitability and robust financial conditions. The companies below meet these criteria, as they have GuruFocus profitability and financial strength ratings of at least 6 out of 10.

title: 2 Medical Device Stocks With Extremely High GF Scores
text: The GF Score system from GuruFocus is a unique metric that takes into account a company's financial strength, profitability, growth, valuation and momentum to determine if the stock is likely to outperform. Those stocks with higher GF Scores generally produce higher returns than those with lower GF Scores, according to a backtesting study by GuruFocus.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Edwards Lifesciences (EW) Now
text: Investors are optimistic about Edwards Lifesciences' (EW) strong segmental performance and the growing demand for its RESILIA tissue valves.
